intro.title: Terms & Conditions
intro.desc: Welcome to Wine Cave. By accessing or using our website, products, or services, you agree to comply with these Terms & Conditions.

s1.tag: Understanding the guidelines of our services
s1.title: Terms & Conditions
s1.lead: Welcome to Wine Cave. By accessing or using our website, products, or services, you agree to comply with the following Terms & Conditions. Please read them carefully before making a purchase or booking.

sections.title: 1. General Information
items: Wine Cave is committed to providing a secure and enjoyable shopping experience.
By using our site, you confirm that you are of legal drinking age in your country of residence.
We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms & Conditions at any time.

sections.title: 2. Orders & Payments
items: All orders are subject to availability and confirmation.
Prices are listed in the specified currency and may change without notice.
We accept multiple payment methods including credit/debit cards, digital wallets, bank transfers, and cash on delivery (where available).
Payment must be completed before order processing unless otherwise specified.

sections.title: 3. Shipping & Delivery
items: Orders are usually processed within 24–48 hours.
Standard delivery times vary between 3–7 business days, depending on location.
International shipping is available, and customs fees (if any) are the responsibility of the customer.
Wine Cave is not liable for delays caused by third-party couriers or unforeseen circumstances.

sections.title: 4. Returns & Refunds
items: We take great care in packaging to ensure wines arrive in excellent condition.
Returns are only accepted if products are damaged, incorrect, or defective upon delivery.
Refunds or replacements will be processed once returned items are inspected.
Requests must be made within 7 days of delivery by contacting our support team.

sections.title: 5. Cancellations
items: Orders can be canceled within 12 hours of purchase, provided they haven’t been dispatched.
Once shipped, cancellations are no longer possible.

sections.title: 6. Use of Website
items: Content, images, and branding on Wine Cave’s website are the intellectual property of Wine Cave and may not be copied, modified, or distributed without permission.
You agree not to misuse our website for fraudulent or unlawful purposes.
